revision.text: '''郡戸王子'''（こうとおうじ）は[[九十九王子]]の3番目。現在消滅。高津宮神社（大阪市中央区高津1-1-29）が跡地とされているが確証はない。
'''郡戸王子'''（'''こうとおうじ'''）は、[[熊野古道]][[九十九王子]]の3番目。現在消滅。高津宮神社（[[大阪市]][[中央区 (大阪市)|中央区]]高津1-1-29）が跡地とされているが確証はない。 {{stub}}

revision.comment: 写真追加
revision.text:
[[File:Kozu-Gu Himekoso-jinja Koto-oji.JPG|thumb|280px|高津宮摂社 比売古曽神社、郡戸王子推定地]] '''郡戸王子'''（'''こうとおうじ'''）は、[[熊野古道]][[九十九王子]]の3番目。現在消滅。[[高津宮]]神社（[[大阪市]][[中央区 (大阪市)|中央区]]高津1-1-29）が跡地とされているが確証はない。「[[五畿内志|摂津志]]」には高津宮の地に鎮座していた[[比売許曽神社]]が郡戸王子とされていたとの記述がある。
*最寄駅 [[大阪市営地下鉄谷町線]][[谷町九丁目駅]]
== 関連項目 == * [[熊野信仰]] * [[熊野古道]] - [[紀伊路]] * [[九十九王子]] : [[坂口王子]] - '''郡戸王子''' - [[上野王子 (大阪市)|上野王子]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:こうとおうし}} [[Category:大阪市の神社]] [[Category:九十九王子]] {{shinto-stub}}

''{{PAGENAME}}'' is one of the {{ill|Kujūku Ōji|fr|Kujūkuōji|ja|九十九王子|lt=99 ōji Shrines}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]]. <!--PAGENAME magic word should be substituted in the future when this is moved to its final pagename. This was added to a few pages not created on Feb 8 because they were very barren and this gives context to the fact that they are in a large group of pages all to be translated more or less as a group similar to the Ise Shrines--> ==Overview==

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11643221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kōto Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== [[File:Kozu-Gu Himekoso-jinja Koto-oji.JPG|thumb|280px|{{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売古曽神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a subsidiary shrine of [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]], believed to be the site of Kōto Ōji]] '''Kōto Ōji''' ('''郡戸王子''') was the third {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists. The site is believed to be where [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]] is currently located, in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Osaka|Chūō-ku, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka|Osaka City]] (1-1-29 Kōzu), though there is no definitive proof.
According to the historical text ''{{ill|Settsu-shi|ja|摂津志|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu-shi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五畿内志|1=Five Kinai Chronicles|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11372555}}'', the {{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売許曽神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=}}, which once stood at the current location of Kōzu Shrine, was regarded as the Kōto Ōji.
== Nearest Station == * [[:en:Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station|Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station]] on the [[:en:Tanimachi Line|Osaka Metro Tanimachi Line]]
== See Also == * {{ill|Kumano Faith|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|qid=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Faith|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} * [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] – {{ill|Kiiji Route|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji Route|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} : {{ill|Sakaguchi Ōji|ja|坂口王子|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaguchi Ōji|qq=|1=Sakaguchi Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11425069}} – '''Kōto Ōji''' – {{ill|Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|ja|上野王子 (大阪市)|lt=Ueno Ōji|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|qq=|1=Ueno Ōji Shrine (Osaka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360400}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11643221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kōto Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== [[File:Kozu-Gu Himekoso-jinja Koto-oji.JPG|thumb|280px|{{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売古曽神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a subsidiary shrine of [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]], believed to be the site of Kōto Ōji]] '''Kōto Ōji''' ('''郡戸王子''') was the third {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists. The site is believed to be where [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]] is currently located, in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Osaka|Chūō-ku, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka|Osaka City]] (1-1-29 Kōzu), though there is no definitive proof.
According to the historical text ''{{ill|Settsu-shi|ja|摂津志|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu-shi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五畿内志|1=Five Kinai Chronicles|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11372555}}'', the {{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売許曽神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=}}, which once stood at the current location of Kōzu Shrine, was regarded as the Kōto Ōji.
== Nearest Station == * [[:en:Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station|Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station]] on the [[:en:Tanimachi Line|Osaka Metro Tanimachi Line]]
== See Also == * {{ill|Kumano Faith|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Faith|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} * [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] – {{ill|Kiiji Route|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji Route|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} : {{ill|Sakaguchi Ōji|ja|坂口王子|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaguchi Ōji|qq=|1=Sakaguchi Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11425069}} – '''Kōto Ōji''' – {{ill|Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|ja|上野王子 (大阪市)|lt=Ueno Ōji|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|qq=|1=Ueno Ōji Shrine (Osaka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360400}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11643221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kōto Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== [[File:Kozu-Gu Himekoso-jinja Koto-oji.JPG|thumb|280px|{{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売古曽神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a subsidiary shrine of [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]], believed to be the site of Kōto Ōji]] '''Kōto Ōji''' ('''郡戸王子''') was the third {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists. The site is believed to be where [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]] is currently located, in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Osaka|Chūō-ku, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka|Osaka City]] (1-1-29 Kōzu), though there is no definitive proof.
According to the historical text ''{{ill|Settsu-shi|ja|摂津志|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu-shi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五畿内志|1=Five Kinai Chronicles|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11372555}}'', the {{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売許曽神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=}}, which once stood at the current location of Kōzu Shrine, was regarded as the Kōto Ōji.
== Nearest Station == * [[:en:Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station|Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station]] on the [[:en:Tanimachi Line|Osaka Metro Tanimachi Line]]
== See Also == * {{ill|Kumano Faith|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Faith|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} * [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] – {{ill|Kiiji Route|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji Route|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} : {{ill|Sakaguchi Ōji|ja|坂口王子|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaguchi Ōji|qq=|1=Sakaguchi Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11425069}} – '''Kōto Ōji''' – {{ill|Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|ja|上野王子 (大阪市)|lt=Ueno Ōji|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|qq=|1=Ueno Ōji Shrine (Osaka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360400}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11643221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kōto Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== [[File:Kozu-Gu Himekoso-jinja Koto-oji.JPG|thumb|280px|{{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売古曽神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a subsidiary shrine of [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]], believed to be the site of Kōto Ōji]] '''Kōto Ōji''' ('''郡戸王子''') was the third {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists. The site is believed to be where [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]] is currently located, in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Osaka|Chūō-ku, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka|Osaka City]] (1-1-29 Kōzu), though there is no definitive proof.
According to the historical text ''{{ill|Settsu-shi|ja|摂津志|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu-shi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五畿内志|1=Five Kinai Chronicles|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11372555}}'', the {{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売許曽神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=}}, which once stood at the current location of Kōzu Shrine, was regarded as the Kōto Ōji.
== Nearest Station == * [[:en:Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station|Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station]] on the [[:en:Tanimachi Line|Osaka Metro Tanimachi Line]]
== See Also == * {{ill|Kumano Faith|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Faith|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} * [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] – {{ill|Kiiji Route|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji Route|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} : {{ill|Sakaguchi Ōji|ja|坂口王子|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaguchi Ōji|1=Sakaguchi Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11425069}} – '''Kōto Ōji''' – {{ill|Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|ja|上野王子 (大阪市)|lt=Ueno Ōji|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|1=Ueno Ōji Shrine (Osaka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360400}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11643221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kōto Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== [[File:Kozu-Gu Himekoso-jinja Koto-oji.JPG|thumb|280px|{{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売古曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a subsidiary shrine of [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]], believed to be the site of Kōto Ōji]] '''Kōto Ōji''' ('''郡戸王子''') was the third {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists. The site is believed to be where [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]] is currently located, in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Osaka|Chūō-ku, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka|Osaka City]] (1-1-29 Kōzu), though there is no definitive proof.
According to the historical text ''{{ill|Settsu-shi|ja|摂津志|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu-shi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五畿内志|1=Five Kinai Chronicles|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11372555}}'', the {{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売許曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=}}, which once stood at the current location of Kōzu Shrine, was regarded as the Kōto Ōji.
== Nearest Station == * [[:en:Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station|Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station]] on the [[:en:Tanimachi Line|Osaka Metro Tanimachi Line]]
== See Also == * {{ill|Kumano Faith|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Faith|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} * [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] – {{ill|Kiiji Route|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji Route|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} : {{ill|Sakaguchi Ōji|ja|坂口王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaguchi Ōji|1=Sakaguchi Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11425069}} – '''Kōto Ōji''' – {{ill|Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|ja|上野王子 (大阪市)|lt=Ueno Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|1=Ueno Ōji Shrine (Osaka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360400}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11643221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kōto Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== [[File:Kozu-Gu Himekoso-jinja Koto-oji.JPG|thumb|280px|{{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売古曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a subsidiary shrine of [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]], believed to be the site of Kōto Ōji]] '''Kōto Ōji''' ('''郡戸王子''') was the third {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists. The site is believed to be where [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]] is currently located, in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Osaka|Chūō-ku, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka|Osaka City]] (1-1-29 Kōzu), though there is no definitive proof.
According to the historical text ''{{ill|Settsu-shi|ja|摂津志|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu-shi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五畿内志|1=Five Kinai Chronicles|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11372555}}'', the {{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売許曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=}}, which once stood at the current location of Kōzu Shrine, was regarded as the Kōto Ōji.
== Nearest Station == * [[:en:Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station|Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station]] on the [[:en:Tanimachi Line|Osaka Metro Tanimachi Line]]
== See Also == * {{ill|Kumano Faith|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Faith|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} * [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] – {{ill|Kiiji Route|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji Route|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} : {{ill|Sakaguchi Ōji|ja|坂口王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaguchi Ōji|1=Sakaguchi Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11425069}} – '''Kōto Ōji''' – {{ill|Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|ja|上野王子 (大阪市)|lt=Ueno Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|1=Ueno Ōji Shrine (Osaka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360400}}

== Nearest Station == * [[:en:Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station|Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station]] on the [[:en:Tanimachi Line|Osaka Metro Tanimachi Line]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11643221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kōto Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== [[File:Kozu-Gu Himekoso-jinja Koto-oji.JPG|thumb|280px|{{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売古曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a subsidiary shrine of [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]], believed to be the site of Kōto Ōji]] '''Kōto Ōji''' ('''郡戸王子''') was the third {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists. The site is believed to be where [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]] is currently located, in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Osaka|Chūō-ku, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka|Osaka City]] (1-1-29 Kōzu), though there is no definitive proof.
According to the historical text ''{{ill|Settsu-shi|ja|摂津志|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu-shi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五畿内志|1=Five Kinai Chronicles|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11372555}}'', the {{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売許曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=}}, which once stood at the current location of Kōzu Shrine, was regarded as the Kōto Ōji.
== Nearest Station == * [[:en:Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station|Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station]] on the [[:en:Tanimachi Line|Osaka Metro Tanimachi Line]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11643221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kōto Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== [[File:Kozu-Gu Himekoso-jinja Koto-oji.JPG|thumb|280px|{{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売古曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a subsidiary shrine of [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]], believed to be the site of Kōto Ōji]] '''Kōto Ōji''' ('''郡戸王子''') was the third {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists. The site is believed to be where [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]] is currently located, in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Osaka|Chūō-ku, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka|Osaka City]] (1-1-29 Kōzu), though there is no definitive proof.
According to the historical text ''{{ill|Settsu-shi|ja|摂津志|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu-shi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五畿内志|1=Five Kinai Chronicles|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11372555}}'', the {{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売許曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=}}, which once stood at the current location of Kōzu Shrine, was regarded as the Kōto Ōji.
== Nearest Station == * [[:en:Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station|Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station]] on the [[:en:Tanimachi Line|Osaka Metro Tanimachi Line]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11643221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kōto Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== [[File:Kozu-Gu Himekoso-jinja Koto-oji.JPG|thumb|280px|{{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売古曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a subsidiary shrine of [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]], believed to be the site of Kōto Ōji]] '''Kōto Ōji''' ('''郡戸王子''') was the third {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists. The site is believed to be where [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]] is currently located, in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Osaka|Chūō-ku, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka|Osaka City]] (1-1-29 Kōzu), though there is no definitive proof.
According to the historical text ''{{ill|Settsu-shi|ja|摂津志|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu-shi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五畿内志|1=Five Kinai Chronicles|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11372555}}'', the {{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売許曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=}}, which once stood at the current location of Kōzu Shrine, was regarded as the Kōto Ōji.
== Nearest Station == * [[:en:Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station|Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station]] on the [[:en:Tanimachi Line|Osaka Metro Tanimachi Line]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11643221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kōto Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== [[File:Kozu-Gu Himekoso-jinja Koto-oji.JPG|thumb|280px|{{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売古曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a subsidiary shrine of [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]], believed to be the site of Kōto Ōji]] '''Kōto Ōji''' ('''郡戸王子''') was the third {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists. The site is believed to be where [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]] is currently located, in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Osaka|Chūō-ku, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka|Osaka City]] (1-1-29 Kōzu), though there is no definitive proof.
According to the historical text ''{{ill|Settsu-shi|ja|摂津志|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu-shi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五畿内志|1=Five Kinai Chronicles|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11372555}}'', the {{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売許曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=}}, which once stood at the current location of Kōzu Shrine, was regarded as the Kōto Ōji.
== Nearest Station == * [[:en:Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station|Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station]] on the [[:en:Tanimachi Line|Osaka Metro Tanimachi Line]]

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11643221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kōto Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== [[File:Kozu-Gu Himekoso-jinja Koto-oji.JPG|thumb|280px|{{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売古曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a subsidiary shrine of [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]], believed to be the site of Kōto Ōji]] '''Kōto Ōji''' ('''郡戸王子''') was the third {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists. The site is believed to be where [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]] is currently located, in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Osaka|Chūō-ku, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka|Osaka City]] (1-1-29 Kōzu), though there is no definitive proof.
According to the historical text ''{{ill|Settsu-shi|ja|摂津志|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu-shi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五畿内志|1=Five Kinai Chronicles|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11372555}}'', the {{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売許曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=}}, which once stood at the current location of Kōzu Shrine, was regarded as the Kōto Ōji.
== Nearest Station == * [[:en:Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station|Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station]] on the [[:en:Tanimachi Line|Osaka Metro Tanimachi Line]]
== See Also == * {{ill|Kumano Faith|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Faith|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} * [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] – {{ill|Kiiji Route|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji Route|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} : {{ill|Sakaguchi Ōji|ja|坂口王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaguchi Ōji|1=Sakaguchi Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11425069}} – '''Kōto Ōji''' – {{ill|Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|ja|上野王子 (大阪市)|lt=Ueno Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|1=Ueno Ōji Shrine (Osaka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360400}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11643221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kōto Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== [[File:Kozu-Gu Himekoso-jinja Koto-oji.JPG|thumb|280px|{{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売古曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a subsidiary shrine of [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]], believed to be the site of Kōto Ōji]] '''Kōto Ōji''' ('''郡戸王子''') was the third {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists. The site is believed to be where [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]] is currently located, in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Osaka|Chūō-ku, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka|Osaka City]] (1-1-29 Kōzu), though there is no definitive proof.
According to the historical text ''{{ill|Settsu-shi|ja|摂津志|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu-shi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五畿内志|1=Five Kinai Chronicles|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11372555}}'', the {{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売許曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=}}, which once stood at the current location of Kōzu Shrine, was regarded as the Kōto Ōji.
== Nearest Station == * [[:en:Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station|Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station]] on the [[:en:Tanimachi Line|Osaka Metro Tanimachi Line]]
== See Also == * {{ill|Kumano Faith|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Faith|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} * [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] – {{ill|Kiiji Route|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji Route|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} : {{ill|Sakaguchi Ōji|ja|坂口王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaguchi Ōji|1=Sakaguchi Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11425069}} – '''Kōto Ōji''' – {{ill|Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|ja|上野王子 (大阪市)|lt=Ueno Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|1=Ueno Ōji Shrine (Osaka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360400}}

According to the historical text ''{{ill|Settsu-shi|ja|摂津志|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu-shi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五畿内志|1=Five Kinai Chronicles|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11372555}}'', the {{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売許曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=}}, which once stood at the current location of Kōzu Shrine, was regarded as the Kōto Ōji.
== Nearest Station == * [[:en:Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station|Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station]] on the [[:en:Tanimachi Line|Osaka Metro Tanimachi Line]]
== See Also == * {{ill|Kumano Faith|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Faith|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} * [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] – {{ill|Kiiji Route|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji Route|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} : {{ill|Sakaguchi Ōji|ja|坂口王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaguchi Ōji|1=Sakaguchi Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11425069}} – '''Kōto Ōji''' – {{ill|Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|ja|上野王子 (大阪市)|lt=Ueno Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|1=Ueno Ōji Shrine (Osaka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360400}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11643221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kōto Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== [[File:Kozu-Gu Himekoso-jinja Koto-oji.JPG|thumb|280px|{{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売古曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a subsidiary shrine of [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]], believed to be the site of Kōto Ōji]] '''Kōto Ōji''' ('''郡戸王子''') was the third {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists. The site is believed to be where [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]] is currently located, in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Osaka|Chūō-ku, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka|Osaka City]] (1-1-29 Kōzu), though there is no definitive proof.
According to the historical text ''{{ill|Settsu-shi|ja|摂津志|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu-shi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五畿内志|1=Five Kinai Chronicles|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11372555}}'', the {{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売許曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=}}, which once stood at the current location of Kōzu Shrine, was regarded as the Kōto Ōji.
== Nearest Station == * [[:en:Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station|Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station]] on the [[:en:Tanimachi Line|Osaka Metro Tanimachi Line]]
== See Also == * {{ill|Kumano Faith|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Faith|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} * [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] – {{ill|Kiiji Route|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji Route|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} : {{ill|Sakaguchi Ōji|ja|坂口王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaguchi Ōji|1=Sakaguchi Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11425069}} – '''Kōto Ōji''' – {{ill|Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|ja|上野王子 (大阪市)|lt=Ueno Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|1=Ueno Ōji Shrine (Osaka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360400}}

revision.comment: Bot: add interwikis from Wikidata
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11643221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kōto Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== [[File:Kozu-Gu Himekoso-jinja Koto-oji.JPG|thumb|280px|{{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売古曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a subsidiary shrine of [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]], believed to be the site of Kōto Ōji]] '''Kōto Ōji''' ('''郡戸王子''') was the third {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists. The site is believed to be where [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]] is currently located, in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Osaka|Chūō-ku, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka|Osaka City]] (1-1-29 Kōzu), though there is no definitive proof.
According to the historical text ''{{ill|Settsu-shi|ja|摂津志|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu-shi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五畿内志|1=Five Kinai Chronicles|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11372555}}'', the {{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売許曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=}}, which once stood at the current location of Kōzu Shrine, was regarded as the Kōto Ōji.
== Nearest Station == * [[:en:Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station|Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station]] on the [[:en:Tanimachi Line|Osaka Metro Tanimachi Line]]
== See Also == * {{ill|Kumano Faith|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Faith|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} * [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] – {{ill|Kiiji Route|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji Route|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} : {{ill|Sakaguchi Ōji|ja|坂口王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaguchi Ōji|1=Sakaguchi Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11425069}} – '''Kōto Ōji''' – {{ill|Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|ja|上野王子 (大阪市)|lt=Ueno Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|1=Ueno Ōji Shrine (Osaka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360400}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11643221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kōto Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== [[File:Kozu-Gu Himekoso-jinja Koto-oji.JPG|thumb|280px|{{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売古曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a subsidiary shrine of [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]], believed to be the site of Kōto Ōji]] '''Kōto Ōji''' ('''郡戸王子''') was the third {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists. The site is believed to be where [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]] is currently located, in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Osaka|Chūō-ku, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka|Osaka City]] (1-1-29 Kōzu), though there is no definitive proof.
According to the historical text ''{{ill|Settsu-shi|ja|摂津志|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu-shi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五畿内志|1=Five Kinai Chronicles|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11372555}}'', the {{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売許曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=}}, which once stood at the current location of Kōzu Shrine, was regarded as the Kōto Ōji.
== Nearest Station == * [[:en:Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station|Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station]] on the [[:en:Tanimachi Line|Osaka Metro Tanimachi Line]]
== See Also == * {{ill|Kumano Faith|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Faith|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} * [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] – {{ill|Kiiji Route|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji Route|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} : {{ill|Sakaguchi Ōji|ja|坂口王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaguchi Ōji|1=Sakaguchi Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11425069}} – '''Kōto Ōji''' – {{ill|Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|ja|上野王子 (大阪市)|lt=Ueno Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|1=Ueno Ōji Shrine (Osaka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360400}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11643221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kōto Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== [[File:Kozu-Gu Himekoso-jinja Koto-oji.JPG|thumb|280px|{{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売古曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a subsidiary shrine of [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]], believed to be the site of Kōto Ōji]] '''Kōto Ōji''' ('''郡戸王子''') was the third {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists. The site is believed to be where [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]] is currently located, in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Osaka|Chūō-ku, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka|Osaka City]] (1-1-29 Kōzu), though there is no definitive proof.
According to the historical text ''{{ill|Settsu-shi|ja|摂津志|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu-shi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五畿内志|1=Five Kinai Chronicles|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11372555}}'', the {{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売許曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=}}, which once stood at the current location of Kōzu Shrine, was regarded as the Kōto Ōji.
== Nearest Station == * [[:en:Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station|Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station]] on the [[:en:Tanimachi Line|Osaka Metro Tanimachi Line]]
== See Also == * {{ill|Kumano Faith|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Faith|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} * [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] – {{ill|Kiiji Route|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji Route|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} : {{ill|Sakaguchi Ōji|ja|坂口王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaguchi Ōji|1=Sakaguchi Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11425069}} – '''Kōto Ōji''' – {{ill|Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|ja|上野王子 (大阪市)|lt=Ueno Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|1=Ueno Ōji Shrine (Osaka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360400}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11643221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kōto Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== [[File:Kozu-Gu Himekoso-jinja Koto-oji.JPG|thumb|280px|{{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売古曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a subsidiary shrine of [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]], believed to be the site of Kōto Ōji]] '''Kōto Ōji''' ('''郡戸王子''') was the third {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists. The site is believed to be where [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]] is currently located, in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Osaka|Chūō-ku, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka|Osaka City]] (1-1-29 Kōzu), though there is no definitive proof.
According to the historical text ''{{ill|Settsu-shi|ja|摂津志|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu-shi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五畿内志|1=Five Kinai Chronicles|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11372555}}'', the {{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売許曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=}}, which once stood at the current location of Kōzu Shrine, was regarded as the Kōto Ōji.
== Nearest Station == * [[:en:Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station|Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station]] on the [[:en:Tanimachi Line|Osaka Metro Tanimachi Line]]
== See Also == * {{ill|Kumano Faith|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Faith|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} * [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] – {{ill|Kiiji Route|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji Route|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} : {{ill|Sakaguchi Ōji|ja|坂口王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaguchi Ōji|1=Sakaguchi Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11425069}} – '''Kōto Ōji''' – {{ill|Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|ja|上野王子 (大阪市)|lt=Ueno Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|1=Ueno Ōji Shrine (Osaka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360400}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11643221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kōto Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== [[File:Kozu-Gu Himekoso-jinja Koto-oji.JPG|thumb|280px|{{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売古曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a subsidiary shrine of [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]], believed to be the site of Kōto Ōji]] '''Kōto Ōji''' ('''郡戸王子''') was the third {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists. The site is believed to be where [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]] is currently located, in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Osaka|Chūō-ku, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka|Osaka City]] (1-1-29 Kōzu), though there is no definitive proof.
According to the historical text ''{{ill|Settsu-shi|ja|摂津志|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu-shi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五畿内志|1=Five Kinai Chronicles|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11372555}}'', the {{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売許曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=}}, which once stood at the current location of Kōzu Shrine, was regarded as the Kōto Ōji.
== Nearest Station == * [[:en:Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station|Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station]] on the [[:en:Tanimachi Line|Osaka Metro Tanimachi Line]]
== See Also == * {{ill|Kumano Faith|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Faith|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} * [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] – {{ill|Kiiji Route|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji Route|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} : {{ill|Sakaguchi Ōji|ja|坂口王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaguchi Ōji|1=Sakaguchi Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11425069}} – '''Kōto Ōji''' – {{ill|Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|ja|上野王子 (大阪市)|lt=Ueno Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|1=Ueno Ōji Shrine (Osaka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360400}}

The shrine no longer exists. The site is believed to be where [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]] is currently located, in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Osaka|Chūō-ku, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka|Osaka City]] (1-1-29 Kōzu), though there is no definitive proof.
According to the historical text ''{{ill|Settsu-shi|ja|摂津志|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu-shi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五畿内志|1=Five Kinai Chronicles|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11372555}}'', the {{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売許曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=}}, which once stood at the current location of Kōzu Shrine, was regarded as the Kōto Ōji.
== Nearest Station == * [[:en:Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station|Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station]] on the [[:en:Tanimachi Line|Osaka Metro Tanimachi Line]]
== See Also == * {{ill|Kumano Faith|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Faith|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} * [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] – {{ill|Kiiji Route|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji Route|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} : {{ill|Sakaguchi Ōji|ja|坂口王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaguchi Ōji|1=Sakaguchi Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11425069}} – '''Kōto Ōji''' – {{ill|Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|ja|上野王子 (大阪市)|lt=Ueno Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|1=Ueno Ōji Shrine (Osaka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360400}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11643221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kōto Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== [[File:Kozu-Gu Himekoso-jinja Koto-oji.JPG|thumb|280px|{{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売古曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a subsidiary shrine of [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]], believed to be the site of Kōto Ōji]] '''Kōto Ōji''' ('''郡戸王子''') was the third {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists. The site is believed to be where [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]] is currently located, in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Osaka|Chūō-ku, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka|Osaka City]] (1-1-29 Kōzu), though there is no definitive proof.
According to the historical text ''{{ill|Settsu-shi|ja|摂津志|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu-shi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五畿内志|1=Five Kinai Chronicles|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11372555}}'', the {{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売許曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=}}, which once stood at the current location of Kōzu Shrine, was regarded as the Kōto Ōji.
== Nearest Station == * [[:en:Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station|Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station]] on the [[:en:Tanimachi Line|Osaka Metro Tanimachi Line]]
== See Also == * {{ill|Kumano Faith|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Faith|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} * [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] – {{ill|Kiiji Route|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji Route|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} : {{ill|Sakaguchi Ōji|ja|坂口王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaguchi Ōji|1=Sakaguchi Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11425069}} – '''Kōto Ōji''' – {{ill|Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|ja|上野王子 (大阪市)|lt=Ueno Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|1=Ueno Ōji Shrine (Osaka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360400}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11643221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kōto Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== [[File:Kozu-Gu Himekoso-jinja Koto-oji.JPG|thumb|280px|{{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売古曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a subsidiary shrine of [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]], believed to be the site of Kōto Ōji]] '''Kōto Ōji''' ('''郡戸王子''') was the third {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists. The site is believed to be where [[:en:Kōzu-gū|Kōzu-gū]] is currently located, in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Osaka|Chūō-ku, Osaka]], [[:en:Osaka|Osaka City]] (1-1-29 Kōzu), though there is no definitive proof.
According to the historical text ''{{ill|Settsu-shi|ja|摂津志|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu-shi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五畿内志|1=Five Kinai Chronicles|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11372555}}'', the {{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売許曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=}}, which once stood at the current location of Kōzu Shrine, was regarded as the Kōto Ōji.
== Nearest Station == * [[:en:Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station|Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station]] on the [[:en:Tanimachi Line|Osaka Metro Tanimachi Line]]
== See Also == * {{ill|Kumano Faith|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Faith|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} * [[:en:Kumano Kodō|Kumano Kodō]] – {{ill|Kiiji Route|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji Route|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} : {{ill|Sakaguchi Ōji|ja|坂口王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaguchi Ōji|1=Sakaguchi Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11425069}} – '''Kōto Ōji''' – {{ill|Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|ja|上野王子 (大阪市)|lt=Ueno Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|1=Ueno Ōji Shrine (Osaka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360400}}

revision.comment: v25: Convert interwiki links [[:en:...]] to {{ill}} templates
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:郡戸王子]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11643221]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kōto Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== [[File:Kozu-Gu Himekoso-jinja Koto-oji.JPG|thumb|280px|{{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売古曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a subsidiary shrine of {{ill|Kōzu-gū|en|Kōzu-gū|WD=Q11671792|lt=Kōzu-gū}}, believed to be the site of Kōto Ōji]] '''Kōto Ōji''' ('''郡戸王子''') was the third {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the {{ill|Kumano Kodō|en|Kumano Kodō|WD=Q17050475|lt=Kumano Kodō}} pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists. The site is believed to be where {{ill|Kōzu-gū|en|Kōzu-gū|WD=Q11671792|lt=Kōzu-gū}} is currently located, in {{ill|Chūō-ku, Osaka|en|Chūō-ku, Osaka|WD=Q876485|lt=Chūō-ku, Osaka}}, {{ill|Osaka|en|Osaka|WD=Q35765|lt=Osaka City}} (1-1-29 Kōzu), though there is no definitive proof.
According to the historical text ''{{ill|Settsu-shi|ja|摂津志|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Settsu-shi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五畿内志|1=Five Kinai Chronicles|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11372555}}'', the {{ill|Himekoso Shrine|ja|比売許曽神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Himekoso Shrine|qq=}}, which once stood at the current location of Kōzu Shrine, was regarded as the Kōto Ōji.
== Nearest Station == * {{ill|Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station|en|Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station|WD=Q1041977|lt=Tanimachi Kyūchōme Station}} on the {{ill|Tanimachi Line|en|Tanimachi Line|WD=Q1142773|lt=Osaka Metro Tanimachi Line}}
== See Also == * {{ill|Kumano Faith|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|WD=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Faith|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} * {{ill|Kumano Kodō|en|Kumano Kodō|WD=Q17050475|lt=Kumano Kodō}} – {{ill|Kiiji Route|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji Route|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Kyuju-kū Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} : {{ill|Sakaguchi Ōji|ja|坂口王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakaguchi Ōji|1=Sakaguchi Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11425069}} – '''Kōto Ōji''' – {{ill|Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|ja|上野王子 (大阪市)|lt=Ueno Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ueno Ōji (Osaka)|1=Ueno Ōji Shrine (Osaka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11360400}}
